Development of a 12‑day intensive activity schedule (11 activities). Update as of 30/05: 13,960 travelers processed | 13,187 screened (94.4%) | 100% sensitized | 0 contacts listed.
149 alerts reported | 84 investigated (56.3%) | 73 confirmed (86.6%) | 33 samples taken (45.02%).
